segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Any fun plans for the weekend? Matt, Yeah, my cousin's getting married this weekend. Actually, I need a new suit for the wedding. So I'm going to go look today after class. You should check out that new boutique on Elm Street. They have a great selection and they offer custom tailoring . that sounds perfect. How are the prices? Pretty reasonable. I think my brother needed a suit for job interviews, and that's where he went.
